testsuite.name: 超时场景测试

testcase.name: 脚本执行超时应返回 REJECT
特征获取超时应不影响整体决策

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:55.608 [Test worker] WARN c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule timeout-rule execution timeout after 54ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.615 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-006 executed in 2ms
